## Samsara (IOT) Earns Analyst Backing Amid Ongoing Valuation Debate

Continued sell-side support is a modest positive signal; the unresolved 'is it still cheap?' framing suggests the market is actively debating whether AI-driven fleet management has room to run after prior appreciation.

- Analyst backing reported for Samsara, maintaining positive sell-side sentiment on the AI-native fleet management name.
- Headline frames the stock as potentially still attractively valued, but no specific price target or metric is disclosed.
- No new operational or financial catalyst mentioned; appears to be a valuation-update piece.
- Medium classifier confidence on ai_native_vertical theme.
